app.title: CIFAR-10 Image Classifier
app.subtitle: Transfer learning from MobileNetV2
app.tagline: Upload a photo or pick a sample to classify it into one of 10 CIFAR-10 categories.
app.pick_a_page: Pick a page from the sidebar to start
app.predict_desc: upload an image and see top-3 predictions plus a Grad-CAM heatmap.
app.metrics_desc: training curves, per-class report, confusion matrix.
predict.no_input: Choose an input method to start.
predict.no_samples: No sample images found. Run app/samples/make_samples.py to generate them.
predict.disclaimer: CIFAR-10 was trained on 32×32 thumbnails. Real-world high-resolution photos will sometimes be misclassified — this is a known domain gap, not a bug.
metrics.title: Model Metrics
metrics.history_missing: History file not found at {path}. Make sure the .pkl is in models/.
about.title: About this project
